name: Scylla (novel tokenizer) + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb: 1.08056553)
author: Simon Marcus
blurb: Scylla is a TokenMonster-derived tm0054 tokenizer discovered via autoresearch, promoted through proxy validation, retokenized over the full FineWeb competition bundle, and paired with a legal score-first TTT stack. Full-data 3-seed mean legal_ttt_exact val_bpb: 1.08056553 (std 0.00047061).
notes: Complete draft pending final language review. Full-data tm0054 bundle uses 79 train shards and 1 val shard, with metadata-driven tokenizer byte accounting and legal score-first TTT only.
